Off Calendar Jun-15-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Nathaniel L. Dunn, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Economy Foods, Inc.

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Economy Foods, Inc.'s Application for right to attach order and writ of attachment granted. A right to attach order shall issue; and a writ shall not issue until plaintiff has filed an undertaking in the sum of $10,000.00. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
